name: payment_gateway
notes: Recovered to normal. During the outage (20:25-21:35) error rate reached 100% due to database connections being unavailable.

name: crm_sync
notes: Suspended, awaiting query optimization. The new SQL query introduced in last Friday's deployment did not undergo performance review, resulting in a full table scan. DBA needs to add proper indexes before it can be resumed.

name: order_service
notes: Recovered. During the outage failure rate was 95%+; approximately 200 orders have abnormal statuses pending verification.

name: database_primary
notes: Recovered. Last night at peak reached 200/200. The crm_data_sync process was holding 300+ connections (exceeding the connection pool limit, crowding out other services' connections). Current connections: 45/200, running normally.
